label: Psychic ritual -- summon shamblers
description: Ritual that summons shambler undead from outside the map. Combat points and eligibility are evaluated at cast time.

combatPointsFromQualityRange.label: Combat points from quality range
combatPointsFromQualityRange.description: Range of combat points spent on summoned shamblers, lerped through by ritual quality.

shamblersAllowed.label: Shamblers allowed
shamblersAllowed.description: Runtime flag overwritten by InitializeCast -- not meaningful to set in XML. Tracks whether the current map and biome allow shamblers to enter.
